title: Investigate and Fix Low-Priority Security Scan Errors
description:
Review low-priority security scan errors for app.datatoolspro.com. The proposed approach is to self-host problematic JavaScript and icon libraries that are currently loaded from external CDNs, eliminating cross-site scripting warnings from the security scanner.

## Approach

Download external JS and icon library dependencies and serve them from the application's own server to eliminate cross-origin loading warnings flagged by security scanning tools.
acceptance_criteria: Low-priority security scan errors for app.datatoolspro.com are reviewed
External JS and icon libraries identified as cross-origin risks are self-hosted
Security scan no longer flags cross-site scripting warnings for self-hosted assets
No functional regressions from switching to self-hosted libraries
implementation_notes: Self-hosting third-party JS and icon libraries eliminates Content Security Policy (CSP) violations and cross-origin warnings from security scanners without changing functionality.
